H4300.derivation: from H2904 (טוּל) in the sense of hammering out;

H4301.derivation: or מַטְמֹן; or מַטְמֻן; from H2934 (טָמַן);
H4301.strongs_def: a secret storehouse; hence, a secreted valuable (buried); generally money

H4302.strongs_def: something planted, i.e. the place (a garden or vineyard), or the thing (a plant, figuratively or men); by implication, the act, planting

H4307.strongs_def: a jail (as a guard-house); also an aim (as being closely watched)

H4310.derivation: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,
H4310.strongs_def: who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix
H4310.kjv_def: any (man), [idiom] he, [idiom] him, [phrase] O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), [phrase] would to God.

H4311.derivation: from H4325 (מַיִם) and H1679 (דֹּבֶא); water of quiet;

H4312.derivation: from H3032 (יָדַד) in the sense of loving; affectionate;

H4313.derivation: from H4325 (מַיִם) and H3420 (יֵרָקוֹן) with the art. interposed; water of the yellowness;

H4314.derivation: from H4325 (מַיִם) and H2091 (זָהָב), water of gold;

H4316.strongs_def: Mica, the name of two Israelites

H4317.derivation: from H4310 (מִי) and (the prefix derivative from) H3588 (כִּי) and H410 (אֵל); who (is) like God?;
H4317.strongs_def: Mikael, the name of an archangel and of nine Israelites

H4318.strongs_def: Micah, the name of seven Israelites

H4320.derivation: from H4310 (מִי) and (the prefix derivative from) H3588 (כִּי) and H3050 (יָהּ); who (is) like Jah?;
H4320.strongs_def: Micajah, the name of two Israelites

H4321.derivation: or מִכָיְהוּ; (Jeremiah 36:11), abbreviated form for H4322 (מִיכָיָהוּ);
H4321.strongs_def: Mikajah, the name of three Israelites

H4322.strongs_def: Mikajah, the name of an Israelite and an Israelitess

H4323.strongs_def: properly, a container, i.e. a streamlet

H4324.derivation: apparently the same as H4323 (מִיכָל); revulet;

H4325.derivation: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);
H4325.strongs_def: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
H4325.usage: water(571x), piss(2x), watersprings(2x), washing(1x), waterflood(1x), watering(1x), variant(1x)

H4326.strongs_def: Mijamin, the name of three Israelites

H4327.derivation: from an unused root meaning to portion out;

H4328.derivation: properly, feminine passive participle of H3245 (יָסַד);

H4331.strongs_def: Mesha, a place in Arabia; also an Israelite

H4332.derivation: from H4310 (מִי) and H410 (אֵל) with the abbreviated form insep. relatively (see H834 (אֲשֶׁר)) interposed; who (is) what God (is) ?;
H4332.strongs_def: Mishael, the name of three Israelites

H4334.strongs_def: a level, i.e. a plain (often used (with the article prefix) as a proper name of certain districts); figuratively, concord; also straightness, i.e. (figuratively) justice (sometimes adverbially, justly)
H4334.kjv_def: equity, even place, plain, right(-eously), (made) straight, uprightness.
H4334.usage: plain(15x), equity(2x), straight(2x), right(1x), righteously(1x), uprightness(1x)

H4336.derivation: (Aramaic) of foreign origin and doubtful significance; name of H4333 (מִישָׁאֵל)

H4339.strongs_def: evenness, i.e. (figuratively) prosperity or concord; also straightness, i.e. (figuratively) rectitude (only in plural with singular sense; often adverbially)
H4339.kjv_def: agreement, aright, that are equal, equity, (things that are) right(-eously, things), sweetly, upright(-ly, -ness).
H4339.usage: equity(4x), uprightly(3x), uprightness(3x), agreement(1x), aright(1x), equal(1x), right(1x), righteously(1x), sweetly(1x), upright(1x)

H4340.strongs_def: a cord (of a tent); or the string (of a bow)

H4341.derivation: sometimes מַכְאוֹב; also (feminine Isaiah 53:3) מַכְאֹבָה; from H3510 (כָּאַב);

H4343.derivation: from the same as H3522 (כַּבּוֹן); knoll;
H4343.strongs_def: Macbena, a place in Palestine settled by him

H4344.strongs_def: a Macbannite or native of Macbena

H4345.derivation: from H3527 (כָּבַר) in the sense of covering (compare H3531 (כְּבָרָה));

H4346.derivation: from H3527 (כָּבַר) in the sense of covering; (compare H4345 (מַכְבֵּר))

H4347.derivation: or (masculine) מַכֶּה; (plural only) from H5221 (נָכָה); a blow (in 2 Chronicles 2:10, of the flail); by implication,
H4347.strongs_def: a wound; figuratively, carnage, also pestilence
H4347.kjv_def: beaten, blow, plague, slaughter, smote, [idiom] sore, stripe, stroke, wound(-ed).
H4347.usage: wound(14x), slaughter(14x), plague(11x), beaten(1x), stripes(2x), stroke(2x), blow(1x), smote(1x), sores(1x), wounded(1x)

H4349.strongs_def: properly, a fixture, i.e. a basis; generally a place, especially as an abode

H4351.derivation: or מְכֹרָה; from the same as H3564 (כּוּר) in the sense of dipping;

H4354.strongs_def: a Makirite or descendant of Makir

H4355.strongs_def: to tumble (in ruins); figuratively, to perish

H4360.strongs_def: something perfect, i.e. a splendid garment

H4362.derivation: from the same as H3646 (כַּמֹּן) in the sense of hiding;

H4363.derivation: (Ezra 2:2 or מִכְמָשׁ; or מִכְמַשׁ; (Nehemiah 11:31), from H3647 (כָּמַס); hidden;
H4363.strongs_def: Mikmas or Mikmash, a place in Palestine

H4364.derivation: or מִכְמֹר; from H3648 (כָּמַר) in the sense of blackening by heat;

H4366.derivation: apparently from an unused root meaning to hide; concealment;

H4367.derivation: from H4100 (מָה) and H5068 (נָדַב) with a particle interposed; what (is) like (a) liberal (man) ?;

H4368.derivation: the same as H4350 (מְכוֹנָה); a base;

H4370.derivation: from H3647 (כָּמַס) in the sense of hiding;
H4370.strongs_def: (only in dual) drawers (from concealing the private parts)

H4371.derivation: probably from an unused root meaning to enumerate;
H4371.strongs_def: an assessment (as based upon a census)

H4373.strongs_def: an enumeration; by implication, a valuation

H4374.strongs_def: a covering, i.e. garment; specifically, a coverlet (for a bed), an awning (from the sun); also the omentum (as covering the intestines)
H4374.kjv_def: clothing, to cover, that which covereth.

H4376.strongs_def: to sell, literally (as merchandise, a daughter in marriage, into slavery), or figuratively (to surrender)

H4380.derivation: probably from the same as H3564 (כּוּר) in the sense of stabbing;

H4382.derivation: patrial from an unused name (the same as H4380 (מְכֵרָה)) of a place in Palestine;
H4382.strongs_def: a Mekerathite, or inhabitant of Mekerah

H4383.strongs_def: a stumbling-block, literally or figuratively (obstacle, enticement (specifically an idol), scruple)
H4383.kjv_def: caused to fall, offence, [idiom] (no-) thing offered, ruin, stumbling-block.

H4384.strongs_def: a stumbling-block, but only figuratively (fall, enticement (idol))

H4385.strongs_def: a thing written, the characters, or a document (letter, copy, edict, poem)

H4388.strongs_def: a mortar; by analogy, a socket (of a tooth)

H4389.strongs_def: dell; the Maktesh, a place in Jerusalem

H4390.strongs_def: to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively)
H4390.kjv_def: accomplish, confirm, [phrase] consecrate, be at an end, be expired, be fenced, fill, fulfil, (be, become, [idiom] draw, give in, go) full(-ly, -ly set, tale), (over-) flow, fulness, furnish, gather (selves, together), presume, replenish, satisfy, set, space, take a (hand-) full, [phrase] have wholly.
H4390.usage: fill(107x), full(48x), fulfil(28x), consecrate(15x), accomplish(7x), replenish(7x), wholly(6x), set(6x), expired(3x), fully(2x), gather(2x), overflow(2x), satisfy(2x)

H4392.strongs_def: full (literally or figuratively) or filling (literally); also (concretely) fulness; adverbially, fully
H4392.kjv_def: [idiom] she that was with child, fill(-ed, -ed with), full(-ly), multitude, as is worth.
H4392.usage: full(57x), fill(3x), fully(1x), much(1x), multitude(1x), worth(1x)

H4393.derivation: rarely מְלוֹא; or מְלוֹ; (Ezekiel [41:8), from H4390 (מָלֵא);
H4393.kjv_def: [idiom] all along, [idiom] all that is (there-) in, fill, ([idiom] that whereof...was) full, fulness, (hand-) full, multitude.
H4393.usage: full(12x), fulness(8x), all(2x), fill(2x), handful(2x), multitude(2x)

H4394.strongs_def: a fulfilling (only in plural), i.e. (literally) a setting (of gems), or (technically) consecration (also concretely, a dedicatory sacrifice)

H4397.derivation: from an unused root meaning to despatch as a deputy;
H4397.strongs_def: a messenger; specifically, of God, i.e. an angel (also a prophet, priest or teacher)

H4399.strongs_def: properly, deputyship, i.e. ministry; generally, employment (never servile) or work (abstractly or concretely); also property (as the result of labor)
H4399.kjv_def: business, [phrase] cattle, [phrase] industrious, occupation, ([phrase] -pied), [phrase] officer, thing (made), use, (manner of) work((-man), -manship).
H4399.usage: work(129x), business(12x), workmanship(5x), goods(2x), cattle(1x), stuff(1x), thing(1x)
